name: Feature request
about: Suggest an authentication API or adapter improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What authentication or integration task should be easier or safer?

## Proposed solution

Describe the package, contract or adapter you want to change.

## Ownership boundary

Explain why this belongs in the reusable library rather than in a consumer application.

## Security and compatibility

Describe token, session, redirect, OAuth, schema or migration implications.
